title: Implement OAuth 2.0 authentication for API gateway
description:
As a developer, I want to implement OAuth 2.0 authentication so that external partners can securely access our APIs.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Support for authorization code flow
- JWT token validation
- Token refresh mechanism
- Rate limiting per client
- Comprehensive logging

Technical Notes:
- Use existing auth service patterns
- Integrate with Keycloak
- Update API documentation
- Add unit and integration tests

title: Create user management API endpoints
description:
Implement CRUD endpoints for user management.

Acceptance Criteria:
- POST /users - create user
- GET /users/{id} - get user details
- PUT /users/{id} - update user
- DELETE /users/{id} - delete user
- List endpoint with pagination
- Proper error handling
- Input validation

title: Login broken for mobile users
description: Login broken.

title: Payment gateway integration with Razorpay
blockers: Payment gateway credentials not received from vendor
description:
Integrate Razorpay payment gateway for subscription payments.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Payment flow from checkout to confirmation
- Webhook handling for payment events
- Refund processing
- Failed payment retry logic
- Payment history and receipts
- PCI DSS compliance

Technical Requirements:
- Use Razorpay SDK
- Store payment metadata securely
- Implement idempotency keys
- Add comprehensive logging

title: Database schema for payment transactions
description: Create database schema for payment transactions including tables for payments, refunds, and payment methods.

title: Search not working
description: Search not working. Please fix this.

title: Refactor user authentication middleware
description:
Current authentication middleware has accumulated technical debt. Need to refactor for better performance and maintainability.

Issues:
- Tight coupling with request handlers
- No proper error handling
- Hardcoded configuration
- Poor test coverage

Refactoring Goals:
- Extract authentication logic to separate service
- Implement proper error handling
- Use dependency injection
- Add comprehensive tests

title: Implement dashboard analytics for admin panel
description:
Create analytics dashboard for admin panel showing key metrics.

Acceptance Criteria:
- User signups over time
- Active users chart
- Revenue metrics
- Feature usage statistics
- Custom date range filtering
- Export to CSV functionality

Design Requirements:
- Responsive layout
- Consistent with existing design system
- Loading states
- Error handling

title: Create API endpoints for dashboard data
description:
Create backend API endpoints to support dashboard analytics.

Endpoints:
- GET /api/v1/analytics/signups
- GET /api/v1/analytics/active-users
- GET /api/v1/analytics/revenue
- GET /api/v1/analytics/feature-usage

All endpoints should support:
- Date range filtering
- Pagination
- Caching
- Rate limiting

title: Investigate database connection leaks
description:
Production database connections are leaking, causing performance degradation and occasional timeouts.

Symptoms:
- Increasing connection count over time
- Connection pool exhaustion
- Slow query responses
- Intermittent 503 errors

Investigation Steps:
- Review connection pool configuration
- Check for unclosed connections in code
- Analyze database logs
- Monitor connection metrics
- Identify top consumers

title: Please fix this issue
description: There's an issue with the button on the homepage. Please fix this.

title: Upgrade Node.js dependencies
description:
Upgrade Node.js and frontend dependencies to latest stable versions.

Dependencies to upgrade:
- React: 18.2.0 → 18.3.1
- TypeScript: 5.0.4 → 5.4.2
- Next.js: 13.4.19 → 14.1.0
- Various npm packages with security vulnerabilities

Steps:
- Update package.json
- Run npm audit fix
- Test all functionality
- Update lock file

title: Document API authentication workflow
description:
Create comprehensive documentation for API authentication workflow.

Documentation to include:
- Authentication flows overview
- OAuth 2.0 implementation details
- Token types and usage
- Error codes and messages
- Code examples in multiple languages
- Best practices
- Troubleshooting guide

title: Implement email notification service
description:
Create a centralized email notification service for sending transactional and marketing emails.

Features:
- Template management
- Queue-based sending
- Retry logic for failures
- Unsubscribe handling
- Delivery tracking
- Rate limiting per recipient

title: Fix memory leak in image processing service
blockers: Waiting for production access from DevOps
description:
Image processing service has a memory leak causing OOM kills in production.

Symptoms:
- Memory usage grows continuously
- Service crashes after ~24 hours
- OOM killer logs show image processing workers

Investigation needed:
- Profile memory usage
- Identify leaking objects
- Check for circular references
- Review image processing libraries
- Test with different image formats

title: Security: Update SSL/TLS certificates
description:
SSL/TLS certificates for production domains are expiring on June 20, 2026. Need to renew and deploy before expiration.

Domains affected:
- api.anilpradhan.com
- app.anilpradhan.com
- auth.anilpradhan.com
- admin.anilpradhan.com

Steps:
- Generate new CSR
- Submit to CA
- Validate domain ownership
- Download certificates
- Deploy to all environments
- Verify with SSL labs

title: Implement password reset flow
description:
Implement secure password reset flow for users.

Flow:
1. User requests password reset
2. System generates unique token
3. Email sent with reset link
4. User clicks link and sets new password
5. Token expires after 1 hour or single use

Security Requirements:
- Rate limiting on reset requests
- Token cannot be guessed
- Old tokens invalidated on password change
- Password strength validation
- Logging without sensitive data

title: Create onboarding documentation for new engineers
description:
Create comprehensive onboarding documentation to help new engineers ramp up quickly.

Sections to include:
- Development environment setup
- Codebase structure overview
- Coding standards and best practices
- Deployment process
- Monitoring and alerting
- Troubleshooting guide
- Team contact information

title: Refactor frontend state management
description:
Current Redux implementation has become unwieldy with too many actions and complex reducers. Need to refactor to use Redux Toolkit and normalize state structure.

Goals:
- Migrate to Redux Toolkit
- Normalize state shape
- Use createSlice for reducers
- Implement RTK Query for API calls
- Reduce boilerplate code
- Improve type safety

title: Investigate Kubernetes deployment failures
description:
Kubernetes deployments are failing intermittently in production.

Symptoms:
- Deployments hang at 'ContainerCreating' state
- Some pods never start
- No clear error messages in logs
- Issue seems related to image pulls

Investigation Steps:
- Check Kubernetes events
- Review deployment logs
- Verify image registry connectivity
- Check resource quotas
- Test with different node pools

title: Implement dark mode for web application
description:
Implement dark mode theme for the web application.

Requirements:
- Toggle switch in user preferences
- Persist preference in localStorage
- Respect OS-level dark mode preference
- Smooth transitions between modes
- All components support dark mode
- Accessibility compliance (WCAG 2.1 AA)

Design Specs:
- Use CSS custom properties for colors
- Dark background: #1a1a1a
- Dark text: #e0e0e0
- Accent colors adjusted for dark mode
- Icons and images should adapt

title: API latency issues in production
description:
API response times have degraded significantly in production, with P95 latency increasing from 200ms to 1.2s.

Affected Endpoints:
- POST /api/v1/payments
- GET /api/v1/users
- GET /api/v1/orders

Symptoms:
- Slow response times
- Increased error rates
- Customer complaints
- High CPU usage on API servers

Investigation:
- Profile slow endpoints
- Check database query performance
- Review recent deployments
- Analyze traffic patterns

title: Update API documentation for v2 endpoints
description:
Update API documentation to include new v2 endpoints released last month.

Endpoints to document:
- POST /api/v2/users
- GET /api/v2/users/{id}
- PUT /api/v2/users/{id}
- GET /api/v2/products
- POST /api/v2/orders

Documentation should include:
- Request/response schemas
- Example requests
- Error codes
- Rate limits
- Authentication requirements

title: Implement caching layer for product catalog
description:
Product catalog queries are causing high database load. Implement Redis caching layer to reduce load and improve response times.

Requirements:
- Cache product listings with TTL
- Cache individual product details
- Cache category hierarchies
- Invalidate cache on product updates
- Handle cache stampedes
- Monitor cache hit/miss ratios

Implementation:
- Use existing Redis cluster
- Implement cache-aside pattern
- Add circuit breakers
- Log cache operations for debugging

title: Fix cross-site scripting vulnerability in user profile
description:
Security scan identified XSS vulnerability in user profile page where user-generated content is rendered without proper escaping.

Vulnerability Details:
- Location: /profile/{id} endpoint
- Parameter: bio field
- Impact: Arbitrary JavaScript execution
- Severity: High
- CVSS Score: 7.5

Fix Required:
- Sanitize user input before rendering
- Implement Content Security Policy
- Add output encoding
- Validate input on save

Testing:
- Verify fix with security team
- Run automated security scans
- Manual penetration testing

title: Implement real-time notifications with WebSockets
description:
Implement WebSocket-based real-time notifications for users.

Features:
- Real-time updates for new messages
- Live notifications for mentions
- Real-time collaboration indicators
- Connection state management
- Automatic reconnection
- Notification history

Technical Requirements:
- Use Socket.IO or native WebSockets
- Handle connection drops gracefully
- Implement message queuing for offline users
- Scale to 10,000+ concurrent connections
- Authentication over WebSocket
- Rate limiting per connection

title: Create WebSocket server for notifications
description:
Create backend WebSocket server to handle real-time notification delivery.

Requirements:
- WebSocket server using Node.js or Go
- Message routing and broadcasting
- Connection management
- Authentication and authorization
- Message persistence for offline users
- Horizontal scaling support
- Monitoring and metrics

Architecture:
- Use Redis for pub/sub
- Stateless connection handling
- Room-based message routing
- Connection heartbeat mechanism

title: Update third-party library with security patches
description:
Third-party library 'lodash' has critical security vulnerabilities that need to be patched.

Vulnerabilities:
- CVE-2024-21888: Prototype pollution (High severity)
- CVE-2023-4879: Regular expression denial of service (Medium severity)

Current Version: 4.17.21
Patched Version: 4.17.22

Impact:
- Affects all frontend applications
- Potential for remote code execution
- Data exfiltration risk

Steps:
- Update lodash to 4.17.22
- Test all functionality
- Run security scans
- Deploy to production
